patches.find: Of the 18 crypto-hashed entries in the April 4 batch, 7 directly restate already-confirmed WINs
patches.replace: Of the 18 crypto-hashed entries in the April 4 batch, 8 directly restate already-confirmed WINs
patches.rationale: PRED-091 (Northern hemisphere heat excess +0.36 W/m² by 2028) also has a crypto_hash and restates WIN-066, making it the 8th restate — not 7th. Count verified from predictions.json.

patches.find: PRED-090 restates WIN-066 (northern hemisphere TOA flux), PRED-082 restates WIN-054 (El Gordo cluster velocity), PRED-097 restates WIN-048 (CMB alignment), and PRED-095 restates WIN-068 (eclipse magnetic anomaly)
patches.replace: PRED-090 restates WIN-066 (northern hemisphere TOA flux), PRED-091 restates WIN-066 (northern hemisphere heat accumulation, 2028 test window), PRED-082 restates WIN-054 (El Gordo cluster velocity), PRED-097 restates WIN-048 (CMB alignment), and PRED-095 restates WIN-068 (eclipse magnetic anomaly)
patches.rationale: Add missing PRED-091 to the list. PRED-091 has crypto_hash 5122d739, registration_date 2026-04-04, and restates_win='066'. Both PRED-090 and PRED-091 restate WIN-066 but with different test parameters (immediate vs 2028 window).
